## Objective

Describe the outcome this issue should produce.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Code or documentation is added in the correct folder.
- [ ] Tests or validation checks pass.
- [ ] README or report is updated where needed.
- [ ] Results are interpreted without making unsupported causal claims.
